_notes.scoring: PMI PMP Exam Content Outline (2026, live from July 9): three domains — People 33%, Process 41%, Business Environment 26%. PMI reports domain performance; mock uses requireAllTopicsAtTarget. Official exam: 180 questions (170 scored + 10 pretest), 240 minutes. Approach mix ~40% predictive / 60% agile+hybrid.
_notes.bank: 350 cards weighted by domain (~116 People / ~143 Process / ~91 Business Environment). Timed session: 51 questions (17+21+13).
